metadata.description: Innobridge AML Address Database — aggregated from OFAC SDN, Tether/USDC blacklists, law enforcement announcements, and community reports.
metadata.note: Live Tether/USDC blacklist checks are performed on-chain at query time. This file covers OFAC SDN and other static sources.

0x098b716b8aaf21512996dc57eb0615e2383e2f.label: STATE_ACTOR
0x098b716b8aaf21512996dc57eb0615e2383e2f.description: Primary address used in Ronin Bridge exploit ($625M). OFAC designated April 14, 2022. FBI attributed to Lazarus Group / APT38.

0x8b99f3660622e21f2910ecca7fbe51d654a151.label: STATE_ACTOR
0x8b99f3660622e21f2910ecca7fbe51d654a151.description: OFAC-designated address linked to Lazarus Group North Korean state hacking operations.

0x9e7e3f47b14e42600b1c75d7a73c88ad044af8.label: STATE_ACTOR
0x9e7e3f47b14e42600b1c75d7a73c88ad044af8.description: Associated with Harmony Horizon Bridge exploit ($100M, June 2022). OFAC designated January 2023.

0x3ee18b2214aff97000d974cf647e7c347e8fa5.label: STATE_ACTOR
0x3ee18b2214aff97000d974cf647e7c347e8fa5.description: Wormhole Bridge contract exploited for $320M (Feb 2022). Funds linked to Lazarus Group via on-chain analysis.

0x1da5821544e25c636c1417ba96ade4cf6d2f9b.label: MIXER
0x1da5821544e25c636c1417ba96ade4cf6d2f9b.description: Blender.io Bitcoin mixer designated by OFAC May 2022. First-ever mixer sanction. Used by Lazarus Group to launder $20.5M from Axie Infinity hack.

0x722122df12d4e14e13ac3b6895a86e84145b69.label: MIXER
0x722122df12d4e14e13ac3b6895a86e84145b69.description: Tornado Cash proxy router contract. Historically OFAC-sanctioned (Aug 2022, delisted March 2025). Still widely associated with mixing/obfuscation activity. Exercise caution.

0x47ce0c6ed5b0ce3d3a51fdb1c52dc66a7c3c29.label: MIXER
0x47ce0c6ed5b0ce3d3a51fdb1c52dc66a7c3c29.description: Tornado Cash 1 ETH anonymity pool contract. Historically sanctioned. Significant volume of illicit funds passed through this pool.

0x910cbd523d972eb0a6f4cae4618ad62622b39d.label: MIXER
0x910cbd523d972eb0a6f4cae4618ad62622b39d.description: Tornado Cash 10 ETH anonymity pool contract. Historically sanctioned.

0xa160cdab225685da1d56aa342ad8841c3b53f2.label: MIXER
0xa160cdab225685da1d56aa342ad8841c3b53f2.description: Tornado Cash 100 ETH anonymity pool contract. Historically sanctioned.

0xd4b88df4d29f5cedd6857912842cff3b20c8cf.label: MIXER
0xd4b88df4d29f5cedd6857912842cff3b20c8cf.description: Tornado Cash 1000 ETH anonymity pool contract. Historically sanctioned.

0xfd8610d20aa15b7b2e3be39b396a1bc3516c71.label: STATE_ACTOR
0xfd8610d20aa15b7b2e3be39b396a1bc3516c71.description: Address linked to laundering of funds from the Feb 2025 Bybit exchange hack ($1.46B). FBI TraderTraitor designation.

0x2b5634c42055806a59e9107ed44d43c426e582.label: STATE_ACTOR
0x2b5634c42055806a59e9107ed44d43c426e582.description: Address linked to laundering of funds from the Feb 2025 Bybit exchange hack ($1.46B).

bc1qxy2kgdygjrsqtzq2n0yrf2493p83kkfjhx0w.label: STATE_ACTOR
bc1qxy2kgdygjrsqtzq2n0yrf2493p83kkfjhx0w.description: Bitcoin address on OFAC SDN list linked to Lazarus Group. Part of DPRK state-sponsored cryptocurrency theft operations.

1p5zedaizqkvb8stzkvnwqewqr2cjbxkyk.label: DNM_DEPOSIT
1p5zedaizqkvb8stzkvnwqewqr2cjbxkyk.description: Bitcoin address associated with Hydra Market, the world's largest darknet market. OFAC designated April 2022 alongside Germany's takedown operation.

0x58f56615180a8eea4c462235d9e215f72484b4.label: HIGH_RISK_VASP
0x58f56615180a8eea4c462235d9e215f72484b4.description: Garantex, Russian cryptocurrency exchange, OFAC-sanctioned April 2022. Known to facilitate transactions for ransomware operators and darknet markets. EU also sanctioned Feb 2023.

0x19aa5fe80d33a56d56c78e82ea5e50e5d80b4d.label: HIGH_RISK_VASP
0x19aa5fe80d33a56d56c78e82ea5e50e5d80b4d.description: Suex OTC, first cryptocurrency exchange sanctioned by OFAC (September 2021). >40% of transaction volume linked to illicit actors including ransomware groups.

0xd882cfc20f52f2599d84b8e8d58c7fb62cfe34.label: STATE_ACTOR
0xd882cfc20f52f2599d84b8e8d58c7fb62cfe34.description: Ethereum address linked to laundering of stolen NEM tokens from the 2018 Coincheck hack ($534M). On-chain analysis links to Lazarus Group.

0xf8de75c7b95e3317279e6b2e16c3e5c1d0f9e5.label: HACK_FUNDS
0xf8de75c7b95e3317279e6b2e16c3e5c1d0f9e5.description: Address associated with unauthorized $400M+ transfer during FTX collapse (Nov 2022). Funds subsequently moved through mixers.

tuvyiap4fxkqb6zzyw3rntqymrcdxqpyx.label: HIGH_RISK_VASP
tuvyiap4fxkqb6zzyw3rntqymrcdxqpyx.description: Garantex TRON/USDT address. OFAC sanctioned. Known conduit for ransomware proceeds and darknet market settlements.

USDT_ETH.description: Tether USDT Ethereum blacklist — 7,268 addresses frozen as of 2025
USDT_ETH.label: USDT_FREEZE

USDC_ETH.description: Circle USDC Ethereum blacklist — 372 addresses frozen as of 2025
USDC_ETH.label: USDC_FREEZE
